title: Santolina chamaecyparissus Cotton Lavender Evergreen Potted Dwarf Garden Shrub (20-30cm (Incl. Pot))
features: Characteristics: Evergreen Foliage; silvery-woolly in appearance, fragrant leaves, bright yellow button-like flowerheads
Height & Spread: Grows to around 0.5m tall, spreads to roughly 1m wide
Period of Interest: Year-round interest. Fragrant silver-white felted foliage. Mid-Summer brings slender stems bearing small, aromatic yellow flowers.
Plant Advice: Plant in well-drained soil. Grows well in full sun even in hot drought conditions.
